matrix_description: DEBUG-ONLY 5-trial variant of matrix_extensibility_v2_llm_only.json. Use for fast iteration (~15 min) when diagnosing observation-payload / dashboard-rendering issues. Do NOT use for paper-quality measurement — n=5 is too few for variance analysis. Promote to matrix_extensibility_v2_llm_only.json (n=30) once the dashboard fix is confirmed working.
_required_operator_policy_changes: global_constraints.llm_request_timeout_ms must be set to 120000 (canonical 8000 is too tight for gemma4:e4b).
_iteration_intent: 5-trial debug. Each iteration takes ~15 min and produces enough trials to inspect class2 transition data per-trial.

cells.description: Debug 5-trial run of LLM_ASSISTED. Same scenario, fixture, expected, and policy override as the full v2 matrix.
cells._policy_overrides_note: See matrix_extensibility_v2.json for full operator runbook.

anchor_commits._purpose: Filled in by the orchestrator at sweep start.
